front: What is a peptide drug's pharmacokinetic profile?
back: Typical peptide PK: 1) Rapid absorption (SC/IM), 2) Distribution: limited by size/lipophilicity, 3) Metabolism: proteolytic degradation (not CYP450), 4) Excretion: renal (glomerular filtration + tubular degradation), 5) Half-life: minutes to hours (unmodified), days (PEGylated/lipidated).
